name: JiimSmith wizard idea chips and staged refine loop
description: Verify that the strategy wizard offers idea suggestions, shows staged thinking while drafting, supports audience/angle steering, and records the refine loop.

planSteps.description: Open the ReelMatrix web app and start a new campaign from an idea.
Verify suggestion chips are visible under the idea box, including one about an agentic testing platform or AI-generated code verification.
Verify the idea textarea is filled with the chip text.
Click Think it through and wait for the draft to finish.
Verify a staged thinking indicator appears while loading rather than only a frozen button.
Verify the draft shows What I heard, Who it's really for, Angles to stand out, Content pillars, and How we'll know it's working.
Click one audience candidate or positioning angle card.
Verify the clicked card is visibly selected or that the feedback box is prefilled with a steer based on the selected option.
Click Refine with this and wait for the refined draft.
Verify the How we got here section lists the turn and includes the submitted steer.
